name: Iteration 21 — Dashboard pagination shows reviews beyond page 1

specs.name: Dashboard pagination controls appear and navigate correctly
specs.description: Verify that the Dashboard history table shows pagination controls and page 2 contains different reviews than page 1

planSteps.description: Navigate to the Dashboard history page
The Reviews tab is active and a table of reviews is visible
The total review count label shows more than 10 reviews (e.g. '21 reviews' or similar number above 10)
Pagination controls are visible with left arrow ← and right arrow → buttons and numbered page buttons
Page 1 button appears active/highlighted (indigo background) indicating the current page
Click the page 2 button (or the → next arrow) to navigate to page 2
The table updates — different rows are now visible (page 2 content)
Page 2 button is now highlighted as the active page
The range indicator shows something like '11–20 of N' or '11–21 of N' confirming page 2 range
Click the ← previous arrow to go back to page 1
Page 1 is active again and the first page of reviews is displayed
